use_cases: Showcase AI image generation tools with interactive hover previews
Display product features in a visually engaging card grid
Create immersive tool comparison pages for creative platforms
Build portfolio sections with atmospheric visual effects
Implement product landing pages with ambient animations
ai_summary: An interactive hover-preview component showcasing AI image generation tools with dark atmospheric styling, ambient glow effects, and subtle noise textures. Features multiple cards with hover-triggered animations and parallax-like interactions, designed for creator-focused SaaS platforms and product showcases.
